_comment: Project-shared Claude Code settings. Committed to git so learners cloning this repo get the canonical Segment 4 MCP demo target. Personal overrides go in settings.local.json (gitignored).
_mcpServers_comment: Project-scoped MCP servers for the Claude Code CLI live in .mcp.json at the repo root (the documented team-share location the CLI reads and prompts to approve on clone), NOT here. See .mcp.json for microsoft-learn and DocumentMCP-ClaudeCode. A parallel .vscode/mcp.json registers the same document server for VS Code's Copilot.
